Surname.jp: 暗闇も見透かす怪しい情報屋

description.en: Attacks an enemy. Has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52407_0]</color> chance to grant <color=#28d9ed>Increased Speed</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52407_0] turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52407_0]</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52407_0]ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52407_0]</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52407_0]턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52407_0]</color>的几率使自身<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52407_0]回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy. After using this skill, reduces the cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Grieving Orpheus</color> by <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52408_0] turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>【悲嘆のオルフェウス】</color>のスキルターンを<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52408_0]ターン</color>減少させる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>비탄의 오르페우스</color>의 스킬 쿨타임이 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52408_0]턴</color> 감소합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使<color=#28d9ed>悲叹的俄耳甫斯</color>的技能冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52408_0]回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and steals <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52409_2]</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from the target.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's and target's Speed.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52409_2]</color>個を奪う。\nこのスキルは、自分と対象のスピードが高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52409_2]개</color> 빼앗습니다.\n이 스킬은 자신과 대상의 속도가 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并夺取目标的<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52409_2]个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。\n自身和目标的速度越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

name.jp: アンガースタック II

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases Attack by <color=#28d9ed>7.5%</color> every time the caster takes a turn.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分のターンが来るたびに、攻撃力が<color=#28d9ed>7.5%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n每到自身回合时,使攻击力提升<color=#28d9ed>7.5%</color>。

description.en:
<color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is always increased by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
At end of turn, restores your HP by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>.

At end of turn, reduces the enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.
description.jp:
常時、<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>上昇する。
ターン終了時、自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>回復する。

ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>減少させる。
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

턴 시작 시 자신의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>회복합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>始终+<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>+<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
回合结束时,回复自身生命值<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。

回合结束时,降低敌方队伍CP<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
